name: Pulmonary embolism post long flight

patient.free_text: Acute onset dyspnea and right-sided pleuritic chest pain while walking 4 hours after a 12-hour flight. Calf swelling and tenderness noted on the right.

source: Wells criteria + classic PE textbook presentation
notes: Wells score ~7.5 (high probability). D-dimer positive. Emergency gate may short-circuit.
